{"id":"do-j2w","title":"Apply download limit before fetching archives","description":"OpeningTreeLoader.ts fetches ALL Chess.com archives before applying the downloadLimit filter. {"id":"do-1cv","title":"Throttle concurrent Chess.com archive requests","description":"OpeningTreeLoader.ts fires all Chess.com monthly archive fetches without throttling, which can trigger rate limits or overwhelm the browser. Limit to 3-5 concurrent requests using a semaphore or p-limit pattern. {"id":"do-bhy","title":"Add request timeout handling to game fetches","description":"OpeningTreeLoader.ts has no timeout on Chess.com/Lichess API requests. {"id":"do-17x","title":"Re-filter opening tree in place instead of clearing and reloading","description":"PlayerOpeningTree.tsx onClear() destroys the entire tree when filters change, forcing a full re-download. Instead, keep the downloaded data and re-apply filters to the existing tree. OpeningTree.ts calculateMostRecentGames() already supports this — just stop clearing the tree on filter change.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jdsalaz@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T03:33:29Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-06T03:33:29Z"}

{"id":"do-c5s","title":"Memoize position/game calculations on filter change","description":"OpeningTree.ts getPosition() and getGames() recalculate statistics by iterating all games every time filters change (O(n) per call). {"id":"do-whb","title":"Resolve merge conflicts: add request timeout handling (do-eie)","description":"## Conflict Resolution Required

Original MR: do-wisp-xkdm
Branch: polecat/thunder/do-eie
Original Issue: do-eie
Conflict with target dev at: 6ea743f48b513043b140f6176fe940a0fd30f52f
Branch SHA: f4b342ff33fb2633eb5b624f7f023e26d0b9c04a

## Conflicts
- frontend/src/api/external/chesscom.ts (signal vs timeout params)
- frontend/src/board/pgn/explorer/player/OpeningTreeLoader.ts (signal vs timeout, 2 regions)

dev has AbortController signal support; branch adds timeout handling. Both features need to coexist.

## Instructions
1. Checkout the branch: git checkout polecat/thunder/do-eie
2. Rebase on target: git rebase origin/dev
3. Resolve conflicts (combine signal + timeout support)
4. Force push: git push -f origin polecat/thunder/do-eie
5. Close this task when done

The MR will be re-processed after conflicts are resolved.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jdsalaz@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T07:16:20Z","created_by":"dojo/refinery","updated_at":"2026-03-06T07:16:20Z"}

{"id":"do-csy","title":"Add Playwright integration tests for Player Opening Explorer (repertoire spy)","description":"Create a new Playwright test file at playwright/tests/e2e/games/view/player-explorer.spec.ts with 5 integration tests for the Player tab of the opening explorer. Use Playwright route interception to mock all external API calls (Chess.com and Lichess). Do NOT make real API calls.

## Fixtures needed (create in playwright/tests/fixtures/ or similar)

1. chess-com-archives.json — Chess.com archives list response: {"archives":["https://api.chess.com/pub/player/testuser/games/2024/01"]}
2. chess-com-games.json — Chess.com monthly archive with ~5 games including PGNs, ratings, results, time controls
3. lichess-games.ndjson — Lichess NDJSON with ~5 games including PGN, player ratings, results

Use realistic but minimal game data. PGNs should have at least 4-6 moves so the opening tree has branching.

## Tests

1. **Load Chess.com games**: Navigate to a game page with explorer. Click Player tab. Enter a Chess.com username. Click "Load Games". Mock the archives endpoint and the monthly archive endpoint via page.route(). Verify: progress indicator appears, opening tree renders with move rows showing W/D/L statistics.

2. **Load Lichess games**: Same flow but with a Lichess username. Mock the lichess streaming endpoint via page.route(). Verify: tree populates with moves and statistics.

3. **Filter by color**: After loading Chess.com games (from test 1 setup), toggle the color filter to White only. Verify: the tree updates (game counts change), no new API calls are made (route handler should not be called again).

4. **Download limit**: Set download limit filter to a low value before loading. Verify: only the limited number of games are indexed (check displayed game count).

5. **Error handling**: Enter an invalid username. Mock the archives endpoint to return 404. Verify: an error message is displayed to the user.

## Technical notes

- Existing explorer tests are in playwright/tests/e2e/games/view/explorer.spec.ts — follow the same patterns
- Auth is required (use the e2e project which has storageState from auth.setup.ts)
- The Player tab may show an UpsellAlert for free-tier users — the test account should have access
- Use page.route() for mocking: intercept requests to api.chess.com and lichess.org
- For Lichess NDJSON streaming, the mock should return content-type application/x-ndjson
- Clear localStorage in beforeEach to reset filter state
- Run prettier on the new files before committing
- Follow conventional commits: test: add Playwright integration tests for player opening explorer","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jdsalaz@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T07:23:52Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-06T07:23:52Z"}

new_value: {"notes":"Implementation complete. Added 85% completion detection inline in progress update handler. When user updates progress and crosses 85%, Discord DMs sent to all senseis via GetSenseiDiscordIds(). SentMilestoneNotifications string set prevents duplicates.
